channel.title: tm - Technisches Messen
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in tm - Technisches Messen

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Kurt Pichler, Julian Brunthaler, Veronika Putz, Sandra Schober, Wolfgang Auer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/teme-2024-frontmatter12

item.title: Measurement systems and sensors with cognitive features III
item.description: Article by Kurt Pichler, Julian Brunthaler, Veronika Putz, Sandra Schober, Wolfgang Auer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/teme-2024-0113

item.title: Opportunities of artificial intelligence in the field of calibration services
item.description: Article by Kurt Pichler, Julian Brunthaler, Veronika Putz, Sandra Schober, Wolfgang Auer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/teme-2024-0038

item.title: Neuronale Netze zur Startwertschätzung bei der Identifikation piezoelektrischer Materialparameter
item.description: Article by Kurt Pichler, Julian Brunthaler, Veronika Putz, Sandra Schober, Wolfgang Auer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/teme-2024-0099

item.title: Spectral reconstruction using neural networks in filter-array-based chip-size spectrometers
item.description: Article by Kurt Pichler, Julian Brunthaler, Veronika Putz, Sandra Schober, Wolfgang Auer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/teme-2024-0063

item.title: Prediction of water absorption of recycled coarse aggregate based on deep learning image segmentation
item.description: Article by Kurt Pichler, Julian Brunthaler, Veronika Putz, Sandra Schober, Wolfgang Auer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/teme-2023-0155

item.title: Surface mortar detection and performance evaluation of recycled aggregates based on hyperspectral technology
item.description: Article by Kurt Pichler, Julian Brunthaler, Veronika Putz, Sandra Schober, Wolfgang Auer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/teme-2023-0106

item.title: A comparative study of classification methods for state recognition in injection molding
item.description: Article by Kurt Pichler, Julian Brunthaler, Veronika Putz, Sandra Schober, Wolfgang Auer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/teme-2024-0100
